metadata.description: Scalekit Auth Stack for GitHub Copilot — AgentKit and SaaSKit plugins.

plugins.name: agentkit
plugins.description: Authentication for AI agents. OAuth flows, token vault, 40+ connectors (Gmail, Slack, Salesforce, etc.), tool discovery, and live testing — so agents can act on behalf of users.

plugins.name: saaskit
plugins.description: Production-ready auth for B2B SaaS apps. Login, sessions, SSO (Okta, Azure AD, Google), SCIM provisioning, RBAC, MCP server auth, and API key management.
